message:
feat(widgets): implement TreePersistState for tree expansion persistence

Adds full Stateful trait implementation for Tree widget:
- TreePersistState stores expanded node paths as HashSet<String>
- Persistence ID support via with_persistence_id() and persistence_id()
- save_state() collects expanded paths recursively from tree structure
- restore_state() applies saved expansion state to restore UI state
- state_key() uses persistence_id or "default" as instance identifier

Changes:
- Implement Stateful for Tree with TreePersistState as associated type
- Export TreePersistState from lib.rs (previously commented out as TODO)
- Add #[allow(dead_code)] to collect_expanded/apply_expanded helpers
  (now used by Stateful impl but flagged by clippy without attr)

Tests added:
- Round-trip save/restore verification
- Persistence ID getter/setter
- State key generation with and without custom ID
- Empty TreePersistState default
- Leaf nodes excluded from expansion tracking (only nodes with children)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
